introSection: Batman is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Fabbri currently owned and travelled by UK showman James Stokes.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Batman operated at Tir Prince Fun Park from 2017 to 2021. Prior to arriving in the UK, the ride was owned by Axels Nöjesfält of Sweden. The roller coaster dates back to 2004.

fullText:
Batman is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Fabbri currently owned and travelled by UK showman James Stokes.

Batman operated at Tir Prince Fun Park from 2017 to 2021. Prior to arriving in the UK, the ride was owned by Axels Nöjesfält of Sweden. The roller coaster dates back to 2004.
